title: ananas bracteatus var. sagenarius
intro: Ananas bracteatus var. sagenarius, also known as the red pineapple or wild pineapple, is a rare and lesser-known species of pineapple native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ananas bracteatus var. sagenarius include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe wounds, making it a valuable herb for treating various health issues. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
